extraction_notes: The summary financial information in section 7.1 is far less granular than the half year statements in DOC-02. No cost of sales, no administrative expenses in the table, no depreciation, no balance sheet detail beyond net assets and retained earnings. This is why annual EBITDA cannot be computed, per assumption A-05.

The reporting entity is ADF Farm Solutions Limited on a company basis, not Senus PLC consolidated. This differs from DOC-02 and is the basis of assumption A-02. Comparing FY figures to HY figures crosses that boundary.

FY2024 loss before tax of 1,130,458 is smaller in magnitude than the operating loss of 1,130,729, implying net interest income of 271 that year. FY2025 shows the expected direction, with loss before tax exceeding operating loss by 2,074. No interest lines are disclosed either year. Flagged rather than resolved.
Prose in section 7.1 states debtors reduced by 51,727 while also stating trade debtors fell 142,361 to 66,990, a fall of 75,371. These do not reconcile unless non-trade debtors rose. Both flagged.
Administrative expenses are stated for FY2025 only. The FY2024 figure is inferable from the stated decrease but is not printed, so it was not extracted, per the rule against inferring absent figures.
Implied share price of 5.126 carries three decimal places and will round to 5.13 in a numeric(18,2) column. Flagged so the precision loss is traceable rather than silent.

Employee headcount of 18 and the private placement are both stated as at Admission in December 2025, which falls in HY2026 rather than FY2025. Attributed to FY2025 as the nearest available period and flagged. A cleaner treatment would need a point-in-time period distinct from the reporting periods.
R&D spend is given only as a percentage of revenue, and the FY2025 figure is hedged as close to 17% while FY2024 is stated flatly as 22%. Confidence scored differently to reflect that.

Geographic split for FY2024 is stated as less than 5% outside Ireland, which is a bound rather than a value. Extracted as 5.0 with confidence 0.60 and noted here. Ireland share for FY2024 is not extracted, since deriving it from a bound would compound the imprecision.
Channel percentages sum to 100 and customer counts sum to 138, reconciling with the headline figure stated elsewhere in the document.

Average contract values are given per product line rather than per channel, despite the surrounding text discussing Enterprise customers. The three products are stored as product segments and should not be summed with channel segments.
Section 5.1.1 refers to a revenue chart by solution, channel and geography which is present as an image in the source. Its underlying values are not readable as text and were not extracted.

Market sizing figures such as the 2 billion dollar 2022 Natural Capital technology market and the 6 billion dollar projection are third party estimates about the industry, not Senus financial data, and were not extracted.
